message.content:
@startuml
class MonoBehaviour {
    "C"
    "MonoBehaviour"
}

class SwordAttack {
    "C"
    "SwordAttack"
    "animator" : Animator
    "attackDamage" : float = 50f
    "staminaCost" : float = 15f
    "«readonly» hIsAttacking" : int
    "playerStats" : Stats.Stats
    "noOfClicks" : int
    "canClick" : bool
    "«readonly» hAttackNo" : int
    "Start() : void"
    "Update() : void"
    "OnTriggerEnter(other:Collider) : void"
    "ComboStarter() : void"
    "ComboCheck() : void"
}

MonoBehaviour <|-- SwordAttack

@enduml
